description.value:
An ornate war fan with razor-edged metal tines, capable of being used folded as a bludgeon or unfolded as a slashing and piercing weapon.

TrainingPropertiesDamageSpecial
BasicOne-Handed, Finesse, LightMelee d4 (B/P/S)Conceal, Keen, Wound

While unfolded: Deflect 2d6 vs ranged attacks. While folded: Gains Stagger and Melee d6.

rmeData.masterPerk: While unfolded, Deflect increases to 2d6 against ranged attacks. While folded, the fan gains Stagger and its melee damage becomes d6.
